description: Observability & Testing - Comprehensive logging, monitoring, metrics collection, paper trading mode, backtesting framework, and testing infrastructure for production-ready trading system

userStories.title: Set up structured logging system
userStories.description: As a system operator, I need a structured logging system to track all operations and debug issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Set up log levels (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL)
Implement log format with context (timestamp, level, module, message)
Set up log rotation (daily, keep 30 days)
Implement log file separation by module (trading, mt5, model, risk)
Create unit tests for logging system
userStories.notes: Logging is essential for debugging and audit trails

userStories.title: Implement trading operation logging
userStories.description: As a system operator, I need detailed logging of all trading operations for audit trails.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement trade execution logging (entry, exit, P&L, duration)
Implement signal generation logging (symbol, direction, confidence, reasons)
Implement risk decision logging (position size, SL/TP, why rejected)
Implement order modification logging (SL/TP changes, partial closes)
Implement position monitoring logging (trailing stop updates)
Implement performance metrics logging (win rate, drawdown, Sharpe)
Add structured log format for easy parsing
Test logging covers all trading operations
userStories.notes: Trading logs are critical for compliance and analysis

userStories.title: Implement error and exception logging
userStories.description: As a system operator, I need comprehensive error logging to debug issues and track failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement error logging with stack traces
Implement error frequency tracking (errors per hour)
Implement error alerting (send notification on critical errors)
Implement error categorization (MT5, database, model, risk)
Test error logging with various error scenarios
Validate error logs contain sufficient context

userStories.title: Set up system monitoring and metrics
userStories.description: As a system operator, I need monitoring and metrics to track system health and performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement system metrics collection (CPU, memory, disk, network)
Implement trading metrics collection (win rate, profit factor, drawdown)
Implement performance metrics (loop execution time, API latency)
Implement service health metrics (MT5 status, database status, model status)
Implement metrics aggregation (per minute, per hour, per day)

userStories.title: Implement performance monitoring and profiling
userStories.description: As a developer, I need performance monitoring to identify bottlenecks and optimize the system.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement trading loop execution time tracking
Implement service-level timing (data fetch, features, prediction, risk, execution)
Implement API endpoint response time tracking
Test performance monitoring with various loads

userStories.title: Implement alerting and notifications
userStories.description: As a system operator, I need alerting and notifications for critical events.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement alert rules (critical errors, risk limit breaches, system failures)
Implement alert channels (log, email, webhook - future)
Implement alert severity levels (info, warning, critical)
userStories.notes: Alerts enable rapid response to issues

userStories.title: Set up paper trading mode foundation
userStories.description: As a tester, I need a paper trading mode to validate the system without risking real money.
acceptanceCriteria: Set up virtual account (virtual balance, equity, margin)
Implement virtual order execution (no real trades)
Add paper trading indicator (visible in UI)
Create unit tests for paper trading
userStories.notes: Paper trading required before live trading

userStories.title: Implement paper trading simulation
userStories.description: As a tester, I need realistic paper trading simulation to validate the system.
acceptanceCriteria: Simulate MT5 connection (no real terminal needed)
Simulate order execution with realistic slippage (1-2 ticks)
Implement paper trading vs live trading comparison
Implement paper trading mode API endpoint
Validate paper trading results match backtests
userStories.notes: Paper trading validates system before live trading

userStories.title: Set up backtesting framework foundation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a backtesting framework to validate strategies on historical data.
acceptanceCriteria: Set up historical data loading (from Parquet files)
Implement backtesting state management (virtual account, positions)

userStories.title: Implement backtesting simulation engine
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a realistic backtesting simulation engine to validate strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement historical signal generation (apply model to historical data)
Implement position sizing (backtest with risk management)
Implement trade lifecycle (entry, SL/TP updates, exit)
Calculate backtesting metrics (returns, Sharpe, drawdown, win rate)
Implement parameter optimization (grid search on backtest)
Test backtesting on 90+ days of data

userStories.title: Implement backtesting reports and visualization
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive backtesting reports and visualizations to analyze results.
acceptanceCriteria: Test report generation on various backtests

userStories.title: Set up testing infrastructure foundation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive testing infrastructure to ensure code quality.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/tests/ directory with proper structure
Implement test fixtures (mock MT5, mock database, test data)
Implement test data generation (synthetic market data)

userStories.title: Implement unit tests for core services
userStories.description: As a developer, I need unit tests for all core services to ensure correctness.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement unit tests for data ingestion service
Implement unit tests for feature engineering
Implement unit tests for model training and inference
Implement unit tests for risk management
Implement unit tests for order execution
Implement unit tests for trading loop
Implement unit tests for error handling

userStories.title: Implement integration tests for workflows
userStories.description: As a developer, I need integration tests to validate end-to-end workflows.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement integration test for trading loop (full workflow)
Implement integration test for MT5 integration
Implement integration test for database operations
Implement integration test for model pipeline
Implement integration test for API endpoints
Implement integration test for WebSocket streaming

userStories.title: Implement system validation and smoke tests
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I need smoke tests to validate the system before deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement smoke test for MT5 connection
Implement smoke test for database connectivity
Implement smoke test for model loading
Implement smoke test for API endpoints
Implement smoke test for WebSocket connection
Implement smoke test for trading loop startup

functionalRequirements: FR-1: System must log all trading operations for audit trail
FR-2: System must log all errors with stack traces and context
FR-3: System must monitor system health and performance metrics
FR-4: System must implement paper trading mode for validation
FR-5: System must implement backtesting framework for strategy validation
FR-6: System must achieve > 80% test coverage
FR-7: System must send alerts for critical events
FR-8: System must generate backtesting reports with visualizations
FR-9: System must implement log rotation and retention
FR-10: System must validate system health before deployment
nonGoals: No distributed logging (ELK stack) in this phase (local files only)
No APM tools (Datadog, New Relic) in this phase
No chaos engineering in this phase
No load testing beyond basic validation
No security penetration testing in this phase
No compliance auditing tools in this phase
technicalConsiderations: Structured logging essential for query and analysis
Log rotation prevents disk space issues
Metrics storage in database enables historical analysis
Paper trading must match live trading as closely as possible
Backtesting must be realistic (include slippage and spread)
Alerting enables rapid response to issues
successMetrics: All trading operations logged with complete context
All errors logged with stack traces and variables
Alerts sent within 10 seconds of critical event
Paper trading runs for 2+ weeks without issues
Paper trading results match backtests within 10%
Backtesting reports generated with all visualizations
All smoke tests pass before deployment

techStack.monitoring: psutil for system metrics, custom metrics collection
techStack.mocking: unittest.mock for mocking MT5 and database
techStack.visualization: matplotlib, plotly for charts and reports

architecture.loggingFlow: Operation → Log Entry → Rotate → Compress → Retain (30 days)
architecture.monitoringFlow: Collect Metrics → Store in Database → Aggregate → Alert → Visualize
architecture.paperTradingFlow: Signal → Virtual Execution → Track P&L → Compare to Live
architecture.backtestingFlow: Historical Data → Signal Generation → Simulate Execution → Calculate Metrics → Generate Report
architecture.testingFlow: Unit Tests → Integration Tests → Smoke Tests → Deploy

timeline.phase2: Logging (Days 5-7): Trading logs, error logs, alerting
timeline.phase3: Paper Trading (Days 8-11): Paper trading setup, simulation, validation
timeline.phase4: Backtesting (Days 12-15): Backtesting framework, simulation engine, reports
timeline.phase5: Testing (Days 16-20): Unit tests, integration tests, smoke tests
